prompt: Outfit: cute Y2K casual street outfit with an oversized off-white cotton fleece hoodie worn in a mini-length silhouette, front pouch pocket, relaxed long sleeves, ribbed cuffs and hem, and a generalized chest graphic print, layered with a light-blue washed denim-like quilted puffer vest featuring an all-over generalized monogram-style pattern, high padded collar, open front, believable padding volume, subtle yellow lining accent, visible seams, real folds, natural seam tension, realistic drape, clean stitching, premium fabric texture, and refined edge finishing; a very short beige to light-brown mini bottom subtly visible beneath the hoodie hem; white chunky platform lace-up sneaker boots with faux-fur ankle trim, thick rubber sole, metal eyelets, small generalized patch-like side details, high-quality material feel, detailed garment realism, not costume-like, not cheap-looking; add a random mix of delicate casual Y2K silver-tone and white-tone accessories that match the outfit without fixing exact pieces.
promptEn: Outfit: cute Y2K casual street outfit with an oversized off-white cotton fleece hoodie worn in a mini-length silhouette, front pouch pocket, relaxed long sleeves, ribbed cuffs and hem, and a generalized chest graphic print, layered with a light-blue washed denim-like quilted puffer vest featuring an all-over generalized monogram-style pattern, high padded collar, open front, believable padding volume, subtle yellow lining accent, visible seams, real folds, natural seam tension, realistic drape, clean stitching, premium fabric texture, and refined edge finishing; a very short beige to light-brown mini bottom subtly visible beneath the hoodie hem; white chunky platform lace-up sneaker boots with faux-fur ankle trim, thick rubber sole, metal eyelets, small generalized patch-like side details, high-quality material feel, detailed garment realism, not costume-like, not cheap-looking; add a random mix of delicate casual Y2K silver-tone and white-tone accessories that match the outfit without fixing exact pieces.
promptZh: 穿搭：可爱的 Y2K 休闲街头风格，内搭一件超大款 米白色 棉质抓绒连帽衫，呈现迷你裙摆廓形，配有前置袋鼠兜、宽松长袖、罗纹袖口和下摆，胸前带有通用图案印花；外搭一件 浅蓝色 水洗牛仔质感绗缝羽绒马甲，通体饰有通用老花图案，高领填充设计，前开襟，填充饱满真实，内衬带有细微黄色点缀，缝线清晰，褶皱自然，接缝张力真实，垂坠感写实，缝合精细，面料质感高级，边缘处理精致；连帽衫下摆下方隐约可见一件极短的米色至浅棕色迷你下装；白色厚底系带运动靴，脚踝处饰有人造毛，厚橡胶底，金属鞋眼，侧面带有小型通用补丁细节，材质感高级，服装细节写实，非演出服质感，无廉价感；搭配一系列随机的 Y2K 风格 银色系 及白色系精致配饰，与整体穿搭协调，无需指定具体单品。
